title: Structural design actions Part 2: Wind actions
committee: Joint Technical Committee BD-006, General Design Requirements and Loading on Structures
scope_summary: Sets out procedures for determining wind speeds and resulting wind actions to be used in the structural design of structures subjected to wind actions other than those caused by tornadoes.
topics: wind actions; structural design; wind speeds; aerodynamic shape factor; dynamic response factor; site exposure multipliers
verbatim_evidence: AS/NZS 1170.2:2021 Incorporating Amendment No. 1 ... Structural design actions Part 2: Wind actions ... This joint Australian/New Zealand standard was prepared by Joint Technical Committee BD-006, General Design Requirements and Loading on Structures. ... Superseding AS/NZS 1170.2:2011 ... This Standard sets out procedures for determining wind speeds and resulting wind actions to be used in the structural design of structures subjected to wind actions other than those caused by tornadoes.

title: Structural design actions Part 2: Wind actions — Amendment No. 1
scope_summary: Applies correction amendments to AS/NZS 1170.2:2021, updating various clauses, tables, and figures relating to wind actions, pressure coefficients, turbulence intensity, and crosswind force spectrums.
topics: wind actions; structural design; amendment; corrections; pressure coefficients; turbulence intensity; local pressure factors

title: Structural design actions Part 2: Wind actions Amendment No. 2
scope_summary: Provides Amendment No. 2 to AS/NZS 1170.2:2021, updating clauses, figures, and tables relating to topographic zones, shielding, wind speeds, openings, response to vortex shedding, and wind loads on roof-mounted solar panels.
topics: wind actions; structural design; wind speeds; topographic multipliers; vortex shedding; solar panels

title: Structural design actions—Snow and ice actions—Commentary (Supplement to AS/NZS 1170.3:2003)
committee: Joint Technical Committee BD-006, General Design Requirements and Loading on Structures
scope_summary: Provides background material and guidance to the requirements of AS/NZS 1170.3:2003, Structural design actions, Part 3: Snow and ice actions, as well as advice on certain types of snow loads and avoidance of common problems.
topics: structural design actions; snow actions; ice actions; commentary; snow loads; ice loads; shape coefficients
verbatim_evidence: AS/NZS 1170.3 Supp 1:2003 AS/NZS 1170.3 Supplement 1:2003 Structural design actions—Snow and ice actions—Commentary (Supplement to AS/NZS 1170.3:2003) ... This Joint Australian/New Zealand Standard supplement was prepared by Joint Technical Committee BD-006, General Design Requirements and Loading on Structures. ... It was published on 4 July 2003. ... This Commentary supersedes AS 1170.3—1990, Minimum design loads on structures—Snow loads—Commentary (Supplement to AS 1170.3—1990) and, in part, NZS 4203:1992
